CustomField.description: User preference: receive occasional updates about FIMBY itself, including operating-cost requests from Strathcona Vineyard Church. Default true (opt-out model) under the CASL registered-charity exemption (Section 6(6)(a)). If counsel later confirms the exemption does not apply, change default to false (express opt-in) and add a UI prompt to confirm consent. Future operating-update senders must check this field before delivering.
CustomField.label: FIMBY Operating Updates Enabled
